videos.title: Tetris® 99 – 54th MAXIMUS CUP Gameplay Trailer - Nintendo Switch
videos.description: The Tetris® 99 54th MAXIMUS CUP event runs from 12 a.m. PT on May 29 to 11:59 p.m. PT on June 1. To participate, you’ll need to be a Nintendo Switch Online member* and play the Tetris 99 online mode during the event period. You’ll earn event points based on your placement in each match. videos.title: STARSEEKER – Release Date Trailer – Nintendo Switch 2
videos.description:
STARSEEKER lands on Nintendo Switch 2 on June 11, 2026! 

Discover deep space with your crew in this new game set within the Astroneer universe. Complete planet-wide objectives across multiple star systems, but make sure to watch out for the unknown perils of space! 

#NintendoSwitch2 #STARSEEKER

videos.title: Yoshi and the Mysterious Book – Launch Trailer – Nintendo Switch 2
videos.description:
The Yoshi and the Mysterious Book game is available now, only on the Nintendo Switch 2 system: https://ninten.do/6000vDvZA 

What discoveries await in this mysterious book? Just see for yourself and take a look! From creatures…habitats…and surprises galore, there’s so much to do and lots to explore!
